assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Step 4.4.1 shows JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC" — both required labels are present in the JQL.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Step 4.4.2 explicitly filters: "Current issue stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1]" and "TC-8022 summary contains: (rhtpa-2.1)" followed by "Match confirmed -- TC-8022 is a preemptive remediation task for the same CVE (CVE-2026-55123) and the same stream (rhtpa-2.1) as TC-8021."

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Step 4.4.3a shows: "PROPOSAL: Create Depend link from TC-8021 to TC-8022" with jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend"). The link topology diagram also confirms TC-8021 --Depend--> TC-8022.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md Step 4.4.3b shows: "PROPOSAL: Remove security-preemptive label from TC-8022" with updated labels "ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123" (security-preemptive removed). The text states: "Removing the security-preemptive label converts TC-8022 from a proactive/preemptive task into a standard remediation task."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md states: "Remediation already exists for stream 2.1.x via TC-8022. Step 8 will skip task creation for this stream. No new remediation tasks need to be created." triage-outcome.md confirms: "Step 8 skipped -- Because TC-8022 already exists as the remediation task for stream 2.1.x, no new remediation tasks need to be created in Step 8." The outcome summary reads: "Preemptive remediation task reconciled -- no new tasks created."
